zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre Glâne於大約1077年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯時，他的父親Ulrich von Oltingen28歲，母親Rilenda Von Walperswil26歲。他於大約1113年與Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1127年2月9日在瑞士瓦特帕耶訥享年51歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre Glâne于大约1077年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯时，他的父亲Ulrich von Oltingen28岁，母亲Rilenda Von Walperswil26岁。他于大约1113年与Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1127年2月9日在瑞士瓦特帕耶訥享年51岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Glâne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Meath): from de Sláine, a rare Norman Irish habitational name from Slane, County Meath. The place- or river name Sláine (compare the river Slaney) means ‘health, wholeness’, and was sometimes used for a holy well.

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre Glâne was born about 1077, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Ulrich von Oltingen, was 28 and his mother, Rilenda Von Walperswil, was 26. He married Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY about 1113, in Geneva, Geneva, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 February 1127, in Payerne, Vaud, Switzerland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Priory, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre Glâne est né environ 1077, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Ulrich von Oltingen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Rilenda Von Walperswil, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY environ 1113, à Genève, Genève, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 février 1127, à Payerne, Vaud, Suisse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Priory, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre Glâne um 1077 in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich von Oltingen 28 und seine Mutter Rilenda Von Walperswil 26. Er hat um 1113 in Genf, Genf, Schweiz Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1127 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Payerne, Waadt, Schweiz und wurde in Priory, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Glâne è nato il circa 1077 nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Ulrich von Oltingen, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Rilenda Von Walperswil, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY circa 1113, nel Ginevra, Ginevra, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1127, nel Payerne, Vaud, Svizzera, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Priory, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre Glâneが約1077年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで生まれた時，父Ulrich von Oltingenは28歳，母Rilenda Von Walperswilは26歳であった。約1113年にスイスジェンeブジェンeブでNicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1127年2月9日にスイスヴァウドペイエルンで51歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニープリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre Glâne(이)가 대략 1077년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich von Oltingen(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Rilenda Von Walperswil(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1113년 스위스 e브 e브에서 Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1127년 2월 9일 스위스 바드 파예른에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Glâne nasceu aproximadamente 1077, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Ulrich von Oltingen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Rilenda Von Walperswil, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY aproximadamente 1113, em Genève, Genève, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1127, em Payerne, Vaud, Suiça, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Priory, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre Glâne родился около 1077 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Ulrich von Oltingen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Rilenda Von Walperswil, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY около 1113 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 февраля 1127 г. в местности пеиирн, вауд, Швейцария в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности приори, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre Glâne nació aproximadamente 1077, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Ulrich von Oltingen, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Rilenda Von Walperswil, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Nicolette Adelaide DE CHASTONAY aproximadamente 1113, en Genève, Genève, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1127, en Payerne, Vaud, Suiza, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Priory, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
